title: Indulgent Mediterranean Lamb Grill
description: Tender lamb, slow-cooked in a mixture of olive oil, herbs, and spices, then brushed with a sweet and tangy barbecue sauce, all served atop a bed of fluffy couscous.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the lamb shoulder with salt-free seasoning blend and black pepper.
Place the lamb shoulder on the grill and cook for 20 minutes on each side, or until browned and cooked to desired doneness.
Transfer the lamb to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook the couscous according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, chopped onion, chopped garlic, chopped oregano, and chopped thyme.
Brush the mixture onto the cooked lamb and serve atop a bed of couscous.
Drizzle with barbecue sauce, if desired.
